content.en:
Since the small forbidden void realm was not too big, and there were many Dao Ancestors pouring in, and the speed of Dao Ancestors' exploration was fast, almost all of the forbidden strange things were found.

This time, the Forbidden Void Realm had indeed given birth to several Forbidden Arcana.

It's a pity that when Ye Tian rushed over, the battle for the forbidden treasure was over.

Therefore, Ye Tian did not snatch a single forbidden treasure.

Of course, he didn't regret anything, after all, he gained a lot.

In the past ten days, he has found a lot of forbidden strange things, and he has also encountered several fights between Dao Ancestors, so he participated in it, and also killed several Dao Ancestors, and robbed a lot of forbidden and strange things.

In this way, the forbidden and strange things he harvested have reached more than 30,000 pieces, and the quality is very high, which is comparable to the overall value of the hundreds of thousands of forbidden and strange things he harvested at the beginning.

In addition, he also harvested a Forbidden Spirit Root Tree, a Forbidden Spirit Root Flower.

These two treasures were almost indescribably valuable, more precious to him than any other treasure.

The forbidden and strange object snatching is almost over, and many Dao Ancestors have already withdrawn from the Forbidden Void Realm, but there are still many powerful Dao Ancestors who have not left, and they are still thinking about fighting for control of the Forbidden Void Realm.

But if you want to refine the Forbidden Void Realm, it is more difficult, and no one must disturb you.

Bang!!!!

The Forbidden Void Realm shook, and the taboo rules in the void appeared from time to time, and this situation attracted the attention of all Dao Ancestors.

"Someone is refining the Forbidden Void Realm, who is so bold and looking for death?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

At this time, many Dao Ancestors rushed over, vowing to stop that Dao Ancestor from refining the Forbidden Void Realm.

-----------------

Ye Tian's speed was very fast, and he was the first Dao Ancestor to arrive.

"It's the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace!"

Ye Tian recognized the Dao Ancestor of the Forbidden Void Realm who was refining the Orthographed Character.

At this time, the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor was using the huge array disks to combine into a large array, communicating with the origin of the Forbidden Void Realm and refining the Forbidden Void Realm.

And beside Shi Ying Dao Ancestor, one Dao Ancestor after another guarded him.

They were all the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors of the Heavenly Emperor Palace!

There are many Heavenly Emperor Palace's Seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors, far exceeding the other Upper Triple Heaven forces.

For example, some of the Sevenfold Heaven forces are just a few Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors, the Eightfold Heaven Forces estimate that there are dozens of Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors, and the Ninth Heaven Forces may be able to have hundreds of Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors.

And in the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm, there were more than a hundred Upper Triple Heaven forces, and it was conceivable that the number of Seventh Heavenly Dao Ancestors was not very large.

For example, this time, there were more than 1,000 Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors who entered the Forbidden Void Realm, about 2,000 Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors, and only a few hundred Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestors.

And there are more than 100 Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors sent by the Heavenly Emperor Palace to protect the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor, which shows how many Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors there are in the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

Moreover, these Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors were so united, they must have been ordered by the high-level of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and their goal was to refine the Forbidden Void Realm and completely control this world.

Maybe the Heavenly Emperor Palace didn't want to be too eager for the Forbidden Void Realm, but it definitely didn't want other forces to obtain the Forbidden Void Realm.

The Heavenly Emperor Palace was in the Refining Forbidden Void Realm, and the Dao Ancestors of the Seventh Heaven or even the Eighth Heaven Force did not dare to do it for a while, otherwise they would offend the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and there were too many Dao Ancestors in the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and they could easily be killed and fall.

The point was that the Seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain didn't really want to compete for the Forbidden Void Realm, so they left the Forbidden Void Realm one by one after they couldn't obtain many forbidden strange things.

The reason why Ye Tian didn't leave was because he also wanted to obtain the Forbidden Void Realm, although there was not much hope, but there was still this hope.

Then.

The Seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors of the Mitian Sect, the Ten Thousand Domains Temple, and the Heavenly Sea Sect have arrived, and the top existence among the Seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors of the three Nine Heavenly Forces has also come here.

Mitian Sect - Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor!

The Temple of Ten Thousand Domains - Evil Buddha and Dao Ancestor!

Tianhai Sect - Demon Demon Dao Ancestor!

These three Dao Ancestors had a very great reputation at the level of the Seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors, and all of them had reached the extreme of the Seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors, and had even comprehended the Supreme Powerful Dao, and had taken a long way on the Supreme Powerful Dao.

In addition, one by one, they have mastered the power of the dark taboo and the forbidden body.

It was not difficult for them to break through the Supreme Dao Ancestor, but they wanted to accumulate deeper, so they did not immediately impact the Supreme Dao Ancestor realm.

Coupled with the birth of the Forbidden Void Realm, they would be sent into the Forbidden Void Realm.

In terms of strength, these three Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors were not weaker than the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestors of the Heavenly Emperor Palace at all.

"Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor, your Heavenly Emperor Palace even wants to occupy the Forbidden Void Realm, we won't agree!"

Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor spoke.

"Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor, have you thought clearly, do you really want to be the enemy of our Heavenly Emperor Palace?" Shi Ying Dao Ancestor said coldly.

"There's no way, the value of a Forbidden Void Realm is too great, even if it's a small Forbidden Void Realm, it's impossible for us to give it up. The Heavenly Emperor Palace is very powerful, but if our major forces are united, your Heavenly Emperor Palace may not be able to compete with us!"

"Whoever does it, who dies!"

Shi Ying Dao Ancestor threatened.

The one hundred Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors of the Heavenly Emperor Palace also showed their momentum one after another, took out their weapons, and a door Dao technique was also ready to urge at any time.

None of the forces of the Mitian Sect, the Tianhai Sect, and the Ten Thousand Domains Temple could compete with the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and the combined Seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors of the three families were only worthy of more than a hundred, after all, the three Nine Heavenly Forces did not send all the Seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors in.

The only advantage was that they had three invincible Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors, and the Heavenly Emperor Palace seemed to have only one Shi Ying Dao Ancestor.

"Do it!"

Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor spoke.

Bang!

The fight has begun!

I saw that the Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor casually performed a claw Dao technique, and with one claw grabbed a Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor in the Heavenly Emperor Palace, although the opponent's body healed again, he was already seriously injured.

A single blow hit a Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, this is the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, which can be called an invincible Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor.

The Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor was almost unable to move, so no matter how many Heavenly Dao Ancestors there were, the Heavenly Emperor Palace was completely suppressed.

Seeing this scene, Shi Ying Daozu was very nervous.

Once the Heavenly Emperor Palace Dao Ancestors were defeated and the Great Array was broken, he would not be able to continue refining the Forbidden Void Realm.

As one of the Seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors of the Famous Heavenly Emperor Palace was defeated, the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor suddenly shouted: "Ghost boy, what are you waiting for, hurry up!"

As soon as these words came out, the audience was shocked!
